title: Quiet Desk Tray
description: A shallow tray that gathers what the day scattered — oak oiled to a soft charcoal, edges eased for hands that move slowly.
care: Wipe with dry cloth; re-oil occasionally
narrativeTitle: A perimeter for the desk — nothing leaves without intention.
narrativeBody: Oak darkens where hands rest; the grain keeps score of evenings without commentary.
atmosphereQuote: Order is not rigidity — it is room for the ritual to begin.
